_comment: realistic_reactor_refine lane (2026-07-20). Preferred conductor lane for STABLE, FRONT-FACING, REALISTIC human targets. Pipeline: rank identity references -> ReActor identity transfer (inswapper_128.onnx) -> facial-hair-aware mask -> LOW-denoise cleanup (0.20-0.35, never 0.55) -> automatic identity+facial-hair+seam verification with explicit status codes. Builds on byrdcast_swap_v0 (reuses detection, reference ranking, ReActor route, embedding cosine).

license.reason: inswapper_128.onnx / InsightFace / ReActor carry non-commercial research licenses. Per DECISIONS 2026-07-15/16 the monetized product path is the Free Swap Stack (own LoRA / IP-Adapter plus-face); this lane is for private identity work only and its non_commercial flag is stamped on every sidecar.
license.monetization_lane: quality_photo_anchored (IP-Adapter plus-face, Apache-2.0) or a trained identity LoRA

identity_source._comment_weights: Stage 1 ranking. Reuses byrdcast score_reference (lighting, quality, face_angle when both poses measured); frontal + sharpness + facial completeness weighted up for a clean front-facing transfer.

reactor._comment_restore: GFPGAN optional + conservative: low visibility so it cannot invent beard texture or drift identity. Stage 4 refine is the real cleanup.

facial_hair_mask._comment: Stage 3. Separates scalp hair/headwear (OUTSIDE the identity zone) from facial hair (INSIDE). Beard/mustache/sideburns/chin/cheeks/jawline are inside the replacement/cleanup zone so the new identity's facial hair replaces the target's. The lower-face boundary is feathered WITHOUT blending the old beard back over the new identity.

refine._comment: Stage 4. LOW-denoise cleanup over the ReActor result so seams/skin match WITHOUT regenerating the target person. Carey's selected reference anchors identity; the target supplies only pose/expression/lighting/structure. Hard band 0.20-0.35; 0.55 is refused because it can rebuild the target identity.

verification._comment: Stage 5. A completed ComfyUI job is NOT an accepted result. Compare final face vs Carey's reference set and emit explicit status codes. Any FAIL keeps the artifact as evidence (status=rejected), never a normal draft.
